title: CosmicWilds
description: Hello! This modpack is for the CosmicWilds Server! It contains lots of exciting adventure and exploration mods such as Biomes o plenty, Cobblemon, When Dungeons Arise, Adventure Z and many more! Feel free to join the discord too!
body:
CosmicWilds Modpack – The Ultimate Cobblemon Experience!

🌟 CosmicWilds is a custom Cobblemon modpack designed for a rich Pokémon adventure in Minecraft! With a perfect mix of exploration, progression, and multiplayer-friendly features, this modpack keeps the game immersive while avoiding overly complex tech systems.

🔥 Key Features:
🔹 Cobblemon & Addons – Catch, train, and battle with Pokémon-inspired mechanics!
🌍 Expansive Exploration – Biomes O’ Plenty, Terralith, and Dungeons & Taverns add new environments!
🏡 Land Claiming & Building – Storage Drawers, Sophisticated Backpacks, and more for better organization!
⚡ Quality of Life Mods – Xaero’s Minimap, Voice Chat, Falling Tree, and dynamic sound enhancements!
🎁 Server Integration – Custom crates, claim blocks, and global buffs to enhance multiplayer gameplay!

🚀 Start your CosmicWilds adventure today and become a true Pokémon master in Minecraft!
